DESCRIPTION: Triggers whenever this card is discarded at the end of your turn.
Triggers whenever this card kills an enemy.
Send cards from the top of your draw pile to your discard pile.
If this card is #ySubmerged [REMOVE_SPACE], add it to your hand.
This card will not be shuffled back into the draw pile.
Triggers whenever the draw pile is shuffled while this is discarded.
Look at cards from the top of your discard pile. Choose one to add to your hand.
A weak enemy that will give you cards when killed. Allowing it to survive will give you more cards for every turn it was alive.
Draw cards when this enemy is killed.
